title: The Automation Stack That Replaced 3 Employees
hook: This automation stack replaced 3 full-time employees.
voiceoverScript: This automation stack replaced 3 full-time employees. I'm not exaggerating. A small agency was paying $12,000 a month for people to do work that machines now handle in seconds. Here's the stack. n8n handles the workflow orchestration. Claude API does the thinking — drafting proposals, scoring leads, writing summaries. Calendly auto-books everything. The result? Proposals go out in 90 seconds instead of 25 minutes. Leads get responded to at 2am. Reports generate themselves every Monday. Total cost to build? Under $2,000. Total monthly running cost? About $15. If you're still doing this stuff manually, you're leaving money on the table. Follow for more automation breakdowns.

scenes.label: The Results
scenes.text: From 25 minutes to 90 seconds per proposal
